title: Smoky Stir Fry with Crunchy Potato
description: A quick and easy stir fry recipe with a smoky twist, featuring crispy potato and crunchy vegetables.

ingredients.name: Potato
ingredients.notes: peeled and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until it starts to brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the sliced bell pepper and cook for another 3-4 minutes.
Add the sliced carrots and cook for 5 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Add the potato and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until it starts to brown and crispy.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce and minced garlic.
Pour the soy sauce mixture over the vegetables and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the vegetables are coated in the sauce.
Serve hot and garnish with crunchy chopped scallions, if desired.
